name: Baked-on-Meringue
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the 2 egg whites until frothy.
2. Add 1/8 teaspoon cream of tartar and continue beating.
3. Gradually beat in 1 cup packed C&H Golden Brown Sugar until stiff peaks form.
4. Spread the mixture over an unbaked cake batter in a pan.
5. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup finely chopped walnuts.
6. Bake according to the cake's instructions.
